name: Indonesian Steak with Onions
recipeInstructions: In a large bowl, combine the chopped onions, garlic, coriander, salt, and both types of pepper. Add the lemon juice, brown sugar, and soy sauce, then mix well to coat evenly. Place the chuck steak in the marinade and refrigerate overnight. Preheat the broiler. Remove the meat from the marinade and place it on a broiler pan or rack farthest from the flame. Broil for 12 minutes. Return the meat to the marinade and broil for an additional 2 minutes. Serve 6 portions.
